name: Mistral Small 3.1

overview: Mistral Small 3.1 is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral Small line. Released 2025-03-17. Compact open-weight line for low-latency, locally deployable general use.
What's notable in this version: Adds multimodal (vision) and 128k context to the 24B Small line (mistral-small-2503).
